flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Stark State College fell 46% between 2006 and 2009 (27.7% → 15.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Stark State College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0k → 5.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Stark State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Stark State College fell 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.9k → $13.8k).
